query:
SELECT 'leads' as tabla, COUNT(*) as total FROM leads
UNION ALL
SELECT 'clients' as tabla, COUNT(*) as total FROM clients;

SELECT l.id as lead_id, l.name, l.email, c.id as client_id, c.source
FROM leads l
LEFT JOIN clients c ON c.email = l.email
ORDER BY l.id DESC LIMIT 10;
